channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: East African Creatives to Showcase Work at Tanzania Expo
item.description: The Mashariki Creative Economy Expo 2026, organized by Culture and Development East Africa (CDEA), will take place in Dar es Salaam from August 18-21, 2026. This event aims to unite designers, artists...

item.title: Zack Apella's Family Appeals for Burial Fund as Supporters Revert Donations
item.description: Zack Apella's brother, Solo, updated followers on the status of the late content creator's burial fundraiser during a TikTok Live session. The family revealed the total budget for the burial stands at...

item.title: Hideaki Anno's 'Shin Kamen Rider' reimagines classic hero with cynical optimism
item.description: Shin Kamen Rider, directed by Hideaki Anno (Neon Genesis Evangelion), is a bold reimagining of the 1971 Kamen Rider series. The film follows Takeshi Hongo, a young man transformed into a grasshopper-h...

item.title: Ontario Faces Wildfire Challenges Amid Waterbomber Repairs
item.description: Ontario has grounded two of its nine waterbombers for repairs as the province battles nearly 200 wildfires in the north. The Ministry of Natural Resources confirmed the maintenance issues but emphasiz...

item.title: South Africa to Review 350,000 Social Grants to Combat Fraud and Save R1.5bn
item.description: The South African government plans to review over 350,000 social grants during the 2026/27 financial year to strengthen the integrity of the social assistance system, curb fraud, and save an estimated...

item.title: Disbarred Lawyer Fined for Insulting Court Employee
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) imposed a fine of P155,000 on Berteni Causing, a disbarred lawyer, for violating the Code of Professional Responsibility and Accountability. The penalty stems from an incident i...

item.title: Trump's Lawyer Denies Supporting Tate Brothers in Politically Motivated Prosecutions
item.description: The article details how Paul Ingraham, a lawyer for former President Donald Trump, has denied any involvement or support for the Tate brothers' legal issues, which are framed as politically motivated ...

item.title: Primary Care Crisis in New Bedford: Challenges and Reforms in Massachusetts
item.description: New Bedford, a city in Massachusetts, is grappling with a severe shortage of primary care providers, leading to long wait times and limited access for residents. A 2025 report highlights that only 36 ...

item.title: Reps Call For Comprehensive Asset Audit Covering Obasanjo To Tinubu Eras
item.description: The House of Representatives has called for a full audit of all assets seized, forfeited, recovered, managed, disposed of or repatriated by Nigerian government institutions since the return to democra...

item.title: Day 8 of Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: NBI Chief Testifies on Threat Allegations, VP in The Hague
item.description: The eighth day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial focused on National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag's testimony regarding alleged threats against President Ferd...

item.title: Canada and U.S. agree to intensify trade talks amid new tariffs
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney confirmed discussions with U.S. President Donald Trump following the announcement of 50% tariffs on Canadian goods. The leaders agreed to intensify trade negotiations in res...

item.title: Municipal funding withholding exacerbates poverty and service crises
item.description: The Alternative Information and Development Centre (AIDC) has condemned the National Treasury's decision to withhold funding from 69 municipalities, arguing that it unfairly targets poor households an...

item.title: US and Iran escalate regional tensions with military strikes and retaliatory attacks
item.description: The article details the escalating military conflict between the United States and Iran, with US forces bombing targets in southern Iran following President Trump's directive to retaliate for American...

item.title: South Carolina Conducts Political Test with Trump and Graham
item.description: The article discusses a political test conducted in South Carolina involving former President Donald Trump and Senator Lindsey Graham. The event, which took place on July 21, 2026, aimed to assess the...

item.title: Sony, Annapurna, and Plan B Adapt Alex Michaelides' Bestseller 'The Silent Patient'
item.description: Sony Pictures has joined forces with Annapurna and Plan B to adapt Alex Michaelides' bestselling novel 'The Silent Patient,' which became a global phenomenon after its 2019 release. The book, publishe...

item.title: Governor Inspects State Secretariat Amid Staff Absence and Conducts Multifaceted Tour
item.description: Governor Umar Namadi of Jigawa State conducted an unannounced inspection of the state secretariat, discovering several top officials' offices locked by 11am as senior civil servants hadn't arrived. Th...

item.title: Coinbase Shares Rise Following Legislative Progress on Regulatory Framework
item.description: Coinbase's stock experienced a significant increase following the passage of the Clarity Act, which addresses regulatory uncertainties surrounding cryptocurrency exchanges. The legislation, which pass...

item.title: Canberra Raiders adjust lineup as Hudson Young and Owen Pattie face injury challenges
item.description: The Canberra Raiders have announced lineup changes ahead of their upcoming match against the Wests Tigers, following injuries to key players Hudson Young and Owen Pattie. Young, a crucial forward, and...

item.title: Food Deliveries and Medicine Stalls Support CJP Protesters at Jantar Mantar After Police Crackdown
item.description: The article highlights how Swiggy and Zomato delivery partners, along with citizens, are providing food and medicine to protesters at Jantar Mantar following a police crackdown on the Cockroach Janta ...

item.title: Canadian Premiers Face Pressure from U.S. Trade Tariffs and Alcohol Boycotts During P.E.I. Meeting
item.description: The article details how U.S. President Donald Trump's imposition of 50% tariffs on Canadian goods has intensified pressure on Canadian provincial leaders attending a meeting in Prince Edward Island. T...
